name_en: COACH CW034 January New Arrival Andrea Diana Bag, versatile for autumn and winter. Classic color scheme, versatile style, a never-out-of-style Diana bag, easy to use and match handheld or shoulder. Zippered design protects items from falling, not too big but has good capacity, practical and convenient to carry.
